reference_images.label: ui
reference_images.purpose: Ground the score and game-over UI placement and text sizing.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_4/art_000016.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by art_000016.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Spawn the sprite as a single-image handle with no runtime atlas index changes.

context.usage: Render a five-digit right-aligned score string at the top-right corner with 10 px top and right margins.

shape.silhouette: Five character slots arranged in one horizontal row for score digits.

acceptance_criteria: The design reserves five equal digit slots and right-aligns the number field within the 50 px width.
Visible pixels use only #535353 and #F7F7F7 plus transparency.
